monsters.name: Bank Manager
monsters.note: Sells deposit box. Robbery target: hostage for vault access.

monsters.name: Bank Teller
monsters.note: Opens savings accounts. Deposit/withdraw gold.

monsters.name: Bank Guard
monsters.note: Robbery target. Thief guild L12: take hostage to start robbery. Tiny chance robbery fails → jail.

monsters.name: Crystal Grandmaster
monsters.note: Accepts all 12 colored crystals to complete quest.

monsters.name: Swamp Witch
monsters.note: Quest giver. Gives info about Sunny after ingredients collected.

monsters.name: Drow Entrance Guard
monsters.note: Front entrance. Has a random quest before allowing entry.

monsters.name: Drow Leader
monsters.note: Leader with random quest.

monsters.name: Drow Witch
monsters.note: Needs 12 ingredients. Casts spell teleporting player to Lloth's map.

monsters.name: Lloth, Drow God
monsters.note: Quest: settle dragon dispute. Gives Lloth's Return Ring. After dragon quest: reveals Sunny's fate.

monsters.name: Bronze Dragon (Adult)
monsters.note: Has a random quest. Quest unlocks after speaking to Bronze Adult Dragon.

monsters.name: Brass Dragon (Adult)
monsters.note: Has a random quest. Quest unlocks after speaking to Brass Adult Dragon.

monsters.name: Copper Dragon (Adult)
monsters.note: Has a random quest. Quest unlocks after speaking to Copper Adult Dragon.

monsters.name: Silver Dragon (Adult)
monsters.note: Has a random quest. Quest unlocks after speaking to Silver Adult Dragon.

monsters.name: Gold Dragon (Adult)
monsters.note: Has a random quest. Quest unlocks after speaking to Gold Adult Dragon.

monsters.name: White Dragon (Adult)
monsters.note: Has a random quest. Quest unlocks after speaking to White Adult Dragon.

monsters.name: Black Dragon (Adult)
monsters.note: Has a random quest. Quest unlocks after speaking to Black Adult Dragon.

monsters.name: Green Dragon (Adult)
monsters.note: Has a random quest. Quest unlocks after speaking to Green Adult Dragon.

monsters.name: Blue Dragon (Adult)
monsters.note: Has a random quest. Quest unlocks after speaking to Blue Adult Dragon.

monsters.name: Red Dragon (Adult)
monsters.note: Has a random quest. Quest unlocks after speaking to Red Adult Dragon.

monsters.name: Ancient Platinum Dragon
monsters.note: Quest available only after all 10 adult dragon quests complete.

monsters.name: Ancient Chromatic Dragon
monsters.note: Quest available only after all 10 adult dragon quests complete. After both ancient quests done: Dragon Peace Ring activates, teleports player back to Lloth.

monsters.name: Gate Guardian
monsters.note: Blocks tent exit. Only allows players wearing Sunny's Ring.

monsters.name: Drow Village Elder
monsters.note: Random quest. One of 8 required for Sunny reunion.

monsters.name: Red Moon Elder
monsters.note: Random quest. One of 8 required for Sunny reunion.

monsters.name: Orange Moon Elder
monsters.note: Random quest. One of 8 required for Sunny reunion.

monsters.name: Yellow Moon Elder
monsters.note: Random quest. One of 8 required for Sunny reunion.

monsters.name: Green Moon Elder
monsters.note: Random quest. One of 8 required for Sunny reunion.

monsters.name: Blue Moon Elder
monsters.note: Random quest. One of 8 required for Sunny reunion.

monsters.name: Violet Moon Elder
monsters.note: Random quest. One of 8 required for Sunny reunion.

monsters.name: Silver Moon Elder
monsters.note: Random quest. One of 8 required for Sunny reunion.

monsters.name: Sunny (Drow Elf)
monsters.note: Appears after all 8 drow village quests complete. Tells family she has become a demi-god. Disappears after conversation.

monsters.name: Ozzy (Castle)
monsters.note: Says hello. Asks where daughter Sunny is.

monsters.name: Nymph (Castle)
monsters.note: Says hello warmly.

monsters.name: Guard Captain
monsters.note: Random quest.

monsters.name: Head Cook
monsters.note: Random quest.

monsters.name: Castle Librarian
monsters.note: Random quest.

monsters.name: Castle Gardener
monsters.note: Random quest.

monsters.name: Castle Guest
monsters.note: Random quest.

monsters.name: Noble Guest
monsters.note: Random quest.

monsters.name: Gate Guard
monsters.note: Random quest.

monsters.name: Castle Servant 1
monsters.note: Random quest.

monsters.name: Castle Servant 2
monsters.note: Random quest.

monsters.name: Castle Servant 3
monsters.note: Random quest.

monsters.name: Prison Warden
monsters.note: Random quest.

monsters.name: Castle Weaponer
monsters.note: Sells 12 castle branded weapons and shields.

monsters.name: Castle Armorer
monsters.note: Sells 12 castle branded armors.

monsters.name: Castle Alchemist
monsters.note: Sells healing potions and 24 ailment cures.

monsters.name: Court Jester
monsters.note: Random quest.

monsters.name: Plague Rat
monsters.note: Inflicts: Poison, Disease, Nausea, Weakness. Alchemist sells cures.

monsters.name: Venomous Serpent
monsters.note: Inflicts: Poison, Bleed, Paralyze, Slow. Alchemist sells cures.

monsters.name: Shock Scorpion
monsters.note: Inflicts: Shock, Stun, Paralyze, Fear. Alchemist sells cures.

monsters.name: Frost Wight
monsters.note: Inflicts: Freeze, Slow, Weakness, Drain. Alchemist sells cures.

monsters.name: Shadow Banshee
monsters.note: Inflicts: Fear, Silence, Confuse, Curse. Alchemist sells cures.

monsters.name: Infernal Imp
monsters.note: Inflicts: Burn, Hex, Madness, Wither. Alchemist sells cures.
